title: Vanilla Plus - Slime Edition
description: Modpack to enhance Minecraft while keeping its vanilla charm. It combines visual polish and quality-of-life upgrades with balanced gameplay improvements.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24a6dfc738e079346a0ad8240ed29059b70389e7.png)

**🎮 Concept**

**Vanilla Plus - Slime Edition** is a complete modpack designed to enhance the Minecraft experience while preserving the authentic vanilla feel.
It is built upon [**Slime Aesthetic**](modrinth.com/modpack/slime-aesthetic), the visual and quality-of-life foundation, and extends it with balanced gameplay tweaks that enrich and refine the base game.

**💡 Philosophy:**

Designed to expand and refine the vanilla experience rather than replace it.
While keeping the core identity intact, it introduces meaningful but balanced changes that improve how the game looks, feels, and plays.
Visual polish, smoother feedback, and selective gameplay additions create a cohesive experience that feels familiar — yet noticeably improved.

**🧩 Key Features:**

- Built upon Slime Aesthetic for a refined visual and interface overhaul
- Light but notable gameplay tweaks that enrich vanilla progression and balance
- Enhanced textures, models, and animations with consistent visual style
- Seamless integration with the vanilla experience — no unnecessary complexity

**©️ Credits:**

- [Unique Goat Horns](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/unique-goat-horns/) Resource Pack
- Debug Stick texture from [Stormilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stormilla) Resource Pack
- Various [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Resource Packs
